title: Manasellam Mazhaiye Lyrics Saguni Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Manasellam Mazhaiye
Singers: Sonu Nigam, Saindhavi

Movie : Saguni
Music : G.V.Prakash
Click here for English Translation

Manasellam mazhaiye,
ninaigiren uyire
en nenjil vandhu dhangi
saaral adidhaai
ennaagum uyire.. uyire

en kannil vandhu ninru
ennai paridhaai
ennaagum uyire..uyire

Iravil vandhadhu chandirana
en azhage vandhadhu un mugamdhan
vennilavo valarndhadhum theindhidume
un azhago theindhidadhA vennila

Pagalil eripadhu suriyana
en azhage un iru paarvaigal dhaan
un imaigal kooridum aayudham dhaan
en uyire ennai enna seigiraai

Mazhaiye
manam unnale poo pookudhe
Manasellam mazhaiye,
ninaigiren uyire

Vaanil pogum paravaigalaai
neeyum naanum pirandhidalaam
ulagaiye, marakkalaam

Veru veru vinveliyil
maari maari thirindhidalaam
Parakalaam,midhakalaam

Kaatrodu kai kordhu povomey
Mugilaagi angum ingum
unjal aaduvom..

Kanavil varuvadhu saathiyama!
en edhire nadapadhu mandhirama!
Kan paarkum kaatchigal thandhirama!
en dhegam yengu neendhi pogudho

kanavil vaazhvadhu saathiyamey
en kanavum palipadhu nichayamey
un viralai pidipen ikkanamey
un uruvam engum inrum vaazhumey

Mazhaiye
manam unnale poo pookudhe
Manasellam mazhaiye,
ninaigiren uyire

Kaadhalaagi karaindhuvitaal
kaalam neram marandhidumey
vaanilai, maarumey..

Ezhu vanna vaanivilil
nooru vannam thonridume
yaavumey..maayamey

Veyiloodu mazhai
vandhu thoorumey
mugilaagi angum
ingum unjal aaduvom

Tharaiyil vinmeen varuvadhillai
vandhaalum kannadhai paarpadhillai
paarthaalum kai adhai thoduvadhillai
thottalo enna aagum en manam

Tharaiyil vinmeen varuvadhundu
vandhaalum kannadhai paarpadhundu
paarthaalum kai adhai thoduvadhundu
thottalo kaadhal aagum un manam

Mazhaiye
manam unnale poo pookudhe
Manasellam mazhaiye...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Manasellam Mazhaiye expresses deep feelings of love and connection, portraying how love can touch one's heart and soul.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In the movie Saguni, this song highlights a romantic moment between the lead characters, emphasizing their emotional bond.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Saindhavi and Sonu Nigam, known for their captivating performances.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Manasellam Mazhaiye was composed by GV PrakashKumar, who is renowned for his melodic creations.

When was the song released?

The song was released on June 4, 2012, as part of the Saguni soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Manasellam Mazhaiye, the heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody create a romantic ambiance that resonates with listeners. The song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and longing, as the singers express their deep feelings for one another. Set against the backdrop of Saguni, this duet captures a pivotal moment in the film, enhancing the narrative's emotional depth. The collaboration between Saindhavi and Sonu Nigam, along with GV PrakashKumar's enchanting composition, makes this song a memorable experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Manasellam Mazhaiye is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Saindhavi and Sonu Nigam, this song from the movie Saguni creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with the heart. The magical composition by GV PrakashKumar elevates the emotional depth, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: The rain in my heart, I think of you, my life, it has come and settled in my heart, what will happen, my life.. my life
It has come and stood in my eyes, it is my reflection, what will happen, my life.. my life
What came in the night was the moon, what came in beauty was your face, like the moon that blooms and shines, your beauty shines like the moon
What rises in the day is the sun, your two eyes are the weapons that speak of your beauty, my life, what are you doing to me
The rain is blooming in my heart because of you, the rain in my heart, I think of you, my life
We can be like the birds that fly in the sky, we were born to this world, we cannot forget
We can change and transform in different worlds, we can be together, we can be in the moment
Let’s hold hands and go away, like clouds, we will swing here and there..
What comes in dreams is a promise! What walks in front of me is a spell! What the eyes see is a gift! Where will my body go to sleep?
What lives in dreams is a promise, my dream is definitely true, I will hold your hand, your form will live on everywhere
The rain is blooming in my heart because of you, the rain in my heart, I think of you, my life
If love breaks, time will forget the sky, it will change..
In the seven-colored sky, a hundred colors will appear, everything.. is a magic
The rain comes with the sun, like clouds, we will swing here and there
Even if the star comes to the earth, it will not be seen, even if it is seen, it will not be touched, what will happen to my heart
Even if the star comes to the earth and is seen, even if it is touched, love will happen to your heart
The rain is blooming in my heart because of you
